---
title: 'catalog list-aliases'
---

List all aliases registered in the catalog.

## Usage

```bash
xorq catalog list-aliases
```

This command takes no command-specific options.

## Example

```bash
$ xorq catalog list-aliases
penguins-prod
penguins-staging
current
```

If the catalog has no aliases, prints `No aliases.`.

## See also

- [`catalog list`](list.qmd)—list catalog entries
- [`catalog add-alias`](add-alias.qmd)—add an alias to an entry
